tax: Use it as an editorial checklist for domain/kingdom/phylum placement, accepted inferred orphan species, Primal naming, deific expansion, and branch-specific cleanup.
ap: Body-plan names must not erase anatomy: true dragons, wyrms, draconids, drakes, kobolds, wyverns, and lung dragons are not interchangeable merely because they are draconic.
eco: Ecological similarity should be checked against descent and transformation rules before moving an entry. Cave convergence is common in the Throat.
beh: Role names remain behavior or background unless they imply a distinct body, inheritance, or metaphysical condition.
traitsText: Branch traits must remain local to the entry. Do not copy breath weapons, psionics, regeneration, planar travel, or social traits across cousins without evidence.
abilities: Use corrections to fix structure first, then expand prose. A well-written paragraph cannot compensate for the wrong parent or rank.
bg: This page is an editorial memory aid for the revision history of the catalogue.
g: This guide records current broad corrections so future passes do not reintroduce older rank and branch errors.
